seo_title: Meta Introduces Completely Private Way to Chat With AI
meta_description: Learn about Meta's Incognito Chat feature that allows private conversations with AI, and explore its benefits and limitations.
body_html:
Direct answer: Meta has introduced a completely private way to chat with AI, allowing users to have invisible conversations.

How Incognito Chat Works

  • Incognito Chat uses end-to-end encryption to ensure that only the user and Meta AI can access the conversation.
  • The feature is available on WhatsApp and other messaging platforms.
  • Users can switch between private and public modes at will.

Benefits of Incognito Chat

FeatureDescription
End-to-end encryptionEnsures that only the user and Meta AI can access the conversation.
Private modeAllows users to have invisible conversations.
Switchable modesUsers can switch between private and public modes at will.

Limitations of Incognito Chat

While Incognito Chat offers several benefits, it also has some limitations. For example:

Incognito Chat is only available on WhatsApp and other messaging platforms.

source.title: Introducing a Completely Private Way to Chat With AI
source.summary:
Incognito Chat lets you talk to Meta AI in a way that is invisible to anyone else.

The post Introducing a Completely Private Way to Chat With AI appeared first on Meta Newsroom.
